channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Food coloring additives linked to higher type 2 diabetes risk
item.description: Several natural and synthetic food coloring additives were associated with a higher incidence of type 2 diabetes. Evidence Rating Level:...

item.title: NHS faces 'triple whammy' during resident doctor walkout
item.description: The NHS is under a 'triple whammy of pressure' from striking resident doctors, a predicted heatwave, and England's opening World Cup game, health officials...

item.title: Over-the-counter CGM approved for children
item.description: The US FDA extended the age of use for Dexcom's Stelo down to 2 years. Medscape Medical News

item.title: Grandparents are a vital resource in child mental health crisis, says psychologist
item.description: With over 40% of American teenagers reporting persistent sadness or hopelessness, a leading child psychologist says grandparents and...
